title: AI Hallucination Risks
text: Large language models can generate unsupported scientific claims.

title: Retrieval Augmented Generation
text: RAG can improve factual reliability by grounding answers in retrieved documents.

title: Small Dataset Problem
text: AI models trained on small biased datasets are not always reliable.

title: Human Oversight in AI Research
text: Human oversight is important when using AI systems for scientific reasoning.

title: RAG Combines Parametric and External Memory
text: Retrieval-augmented generation combines a pretrained sequence-to-sequence model with retrieved documents from an external dense vector index.
source_name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks

title: RAG Improved Factuality in Evaluated Generation Tasks
text: In the original RAG experiments, retrieval-augmented models generated more factual language than a parametric-only sequence-to-sequence baseline on the evaluated generation tasks.
source_name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks

title: Dense Passage Retrieval for Open-Domain QA
text: A dual-encoder dense retriever improved top-20 passage retrieval accuracy over a Lucene BM25 baseline on several open-domain question answering datasets.
source_name: Dense Passage Retrieval for Open-Domain Question Answering

title: BEIR Uses Diverse Retrieval Datasets
text: The BEIR benchmark evaluates information retrieval systems across eighteen public datasets representing different retrieval tasks and domains.
source_name: BEIR: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Zero-shot Evaluation of Information Retrieval Models

title: Retrieval Methods Have Different Generalization Tradeoffs
text: BEIR found BM25 to be a robust baseline and reported that retrieval effectiveness and computational cost varied across dense, sparse, reranking, and late-interaction methods.
source_name: BEIR: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Zero-shot Evaluation of Information Retrieval Models

title: Knowledge-Intensive Tasks Need Provenance Evaluation
text: KILT evaluates both downstream task performance and the ability to provide supporting provenance against a shared snapshot of Wikipedia.
source_name: KILT: A Benchmark for Knowledge Intensive Language Tasks

title: Language Models Can Reproduce Human Misconceptions
text: TruthfulQA was designed to evaluate whether language models reproduce common human misconceptions and false beliefs when answering questions.
source_name: TruthfulQA: Measuring How Models Mimic Human Falsehoods

title: Model Scale Alone Does Not Guarantee Truthfulness
text: TruthfulQA results indicated that increasing language model scale alone was not sufficient to guarantee improved truthfulness.
source_name: TruthfulQA: Measuring How Models Mimic Human Falsehoods

title: Sampling Consistency Can Signal Hallucination
text: SelfCheckGPT detects potential hallucinations by comparing factual consistency across multiple sampled responses from the same language model.
source_name: SelfCheckGPT: Zero-Resource Black-Box Hallucination Detection for Generative Large Language Models

title: FActScore Evaluates Atomic Factual Claims
text: FActScore decomposes long-form generations into atomic facts and measures the percentage of those facts supported by a reliable knowledge source.
source_name: FActScore: Fine-grained Atomic Evaluation of Factual Precision in Long Form Text Generation

title: Datasheets Document Dataset Creation and Use
text: Datasheets for Datasets proposes documenting dataset motivation, composition, collection processes, and recommended uses to improve transparency and accountability.

title: Model Cards Clarify Intended Uses and Limitations
text: Model cards document intended uses, evaluation procedures, performance characteristics, and relevant limitations to clarify where a model is or is not suitable.

title: AI Risk Management Applies Across the Lifecycle
text: NIST AI RMF 1.0 provides a voluntary framework for managing AI risks and promoting trustworthy and responsible development and use across the AI lifecycle.

title: Generative AI Requires Tailored Risk Management
text: The NIST Generative AI Profile adapts the AI Risk Management Framework to risks associated with generative AI and proposes actions for managing those risks.
source_name: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile
